purpose: Thin per-deposit INDEX into the recovered external metadata for this deposit's legacy Zenodo DOIs. The actual records live in the bulk data stores under data/ (openalex-severed-recovery.json, zenodo-xml-pretermination-2026-06-07.tar.gz, datacite-full-backup.json, datacite-survivors-multi-heteronym.json). Sidecars do not duplicate those records — they map each covered DOI to its identifier in each store.

10.5281/zenodo.19425446.title: The Caesura: A Sovereignty Audit Protocol Derived from Luke 20:24–25 (EA-CAESURA-01)

10.5281/zenodo.19319642.title: Whose Image and Superscription? Toward a Semantic Economics of the Mint (EA-SEI-MINT-01)

10.5281/zenodo.18307393.title: The Socratic Vow of Logos as Salvation: A Full Preservation of the Original Input, Interpretation, and Complete Development — Crimson Hexagon Archive

10.5281/zenodo.19464332.title: The Number of the Superscription: Coinage, Compression, and Inscriptional Sovereignty in Revelation (EA-OPNUM-01)

10.5281/zenodo.20367202.title: Render unto the Operator: The Inverse Principle of Name and Superscription on the Coin of the Academy

10.5281/zenodo.19898845.title: Epistle to the Human Diaspora — Critical Edition with Blended Temporal Apparatus (EA-EPISTLE-01 v2.0)

openalex.lookup: records[].doi == this DOI; openalex_id is the W-prefixed OpenAlex Work ID

zenodo_bulk_xml.lookup: extract <record_id>.xml from the tarball where record_id is the digits after 'zenodo.'

datacite_survivor_sweep.lookup: search records[].attributes.doi == this DOI across orcid_records, name_records, sigil_records, vox_records, feist_records
